whyUs.officialProgram: Program regulated and supervised by official bodies

howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: An official mechanism that funds 100% of thermal insulation works. Here's how it works, step by step:

step1.title: TrueGreen installs and advances all costs
step1.description: Our team performs the complete insulation installation. TrueGreen advances 100% of costs: materials, labor, and transport. You pay nothing.
step1.summary: We install complete insulation. TrueGreen advances all costs.

step2.title: We handle all documentation
step2.description: We prepare the complete technical file: measurements, material certificates, energy savings calculations. You don't need to do any paperwork.
step2.summary: We prepare the entire technical file. You do nothing.

step3.title: Independent verification
step3.description: An accredited verification body reviews and validates that the energy savings are real and comply with regulations.
step3.summary: An accredited body verifies the energy savings.

step4.title: Validation and compensation
step4.description: The verified file is submitted to the energy company, which purchases the Energy Savings Certificates to fulfill its legal quota.
step4.summary: The energy company compensates the costs. The process is supervised.

howItWorks.result: The customer pays nothing. TrueGreen is compensated by the energy company. The company fulfills its legal quota. The entire process is supervised.
howItWorks.legalLink: Check the legal framework on the official page →

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: Nothing speaks better about the quality of our work than the experience of those who have already chosen us.
testimonials.verifiedSubtitle: Real ratings from homeowners who already enjoy a more efficient home.

reviews.name: Maria P.
reviews.text: I saw the ad online, filled out the form and within less than a week everything was done. I was impressed by the team's professionalism and efficiency.

reviews.name: Ion D.
reviews.text: Splendid work. Very polite workers who explained all the steps, very clean and careful. We were surprised by the speed and trust. And it's free!

reviews.name: Alexandru M.
reviews.text: Thank you TrueGreen for the attic insulation. I was pleasantly surprised they did it for free, an incredible detail!

reviews.name: Elena V.
reviews.text: Excellent experience from start to finish. The team was punctual, professional, and clean. I highly recommend them!

reviews.name: Gheorghe T.
reviews.text: I couldn't believe it could be free, but everything was confirmed. Quality work, at no cost to us.

about.title: About TrueGreen
about.subtitle: Our mission is to make energy efficiency accessible to everyone.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete thermal insulation and energy efficiency solutions.

faq.sectionSubtitle: Answers to the most common questions about our services.

items.question: Is it really free?
items.answer: Yes, the official program funds 100% of installation costs. You don't need to pay anything upfront and there are no hidden fees.

items.question: How long does installation take?
items.answer: Complete installation usually takes between 2 and 4 hours, depending on the attic size.

items.question: What type of insulation do you use?
items.answer: We use blown mineral wool, a certified, fireproof and ecological material with excellent thermal insulation properties.

items.question: Who can benefit from the program?
items.answer: Any homeowner with an uninsulated attic or loft can apply. There are no income requirements.

items.question: Do I need to handle any paperwork?
items.answer: No, our team handles all administrative procedures and necessary documentation.
